name: robot_vac_threshold_ramp
purpose: Modular one-sided threshold ramp for robot vacuums crossing a 680 mm wide, 16.5 mm high doorway threshold, split for the smaller Creality K1 build plate.
features: four printable ramp segments sized for the Creality K1 bed
longer one-sided 1:4.7 slope after test fitting
concave 15 mm quarter-round relief at the tall end
1.5 mm reinforced riser above the quarter-round relief
lower shallow raised wavy traction lines on the sloped top face
solid exterior rails around the clean full-width print plates
straight seams with two shallow rounded alignment keys per join
conservative underside center relief to save filament while keeping edges and rear contact solid
curved side-entry footprint on the far left and far right ends
clean lateral side-entry ramps on the outer ends that feather down near floor height
side-entry footprint and ramp width taper out gradually before the high rear quarter-round fit zone
symmetric shallow raised wave traction lines
flat bottom for tape or friction placement
assumptions: single-sided ramp from floor up to threshold
PETG preferred; PLA acceptable for indoor proof-of-fit
the current join strategy uses shallow clean alignment keys instead of wavy jigsaw edges
full-width plates should be printed as four separate Creality K1 jobs or plates
the generic 3MF files are intended as slicer-ready geometry imports, with STL also provided
